sync_rules.new_file: Create a pending Asset Object and queue visual analysis.
sync_rules.same_sha_new_path: Treat as moved/renamed and preserve the Asset Object, analysis and relations.
sync_rules.same_path_new_sha: Treat as replaced content; preserve manual metadata and relations, queue visual reanalysis.
sync_rules.missing_but_in_use: Block archive until replacement or explicit owner decision.
sync_rules.delete_asset_object: Only after explicit manual confirmation and only when no locked/current usage remains.
